title: Stop blaming immigration for low U.S. reading scores, top psychologist says. The problem is actually devices giving easy access to social media
summary:
“If you subtract immigration out of test scores, all of a sudden our test scores skyrocket,” he said.
From 2015 to 2025, average reading scores fell by nearly a grade level, showing a decline in almost every state.
“Even if we assume that the foreign-born kids performed worse on reading tests—and that definitely wasn’t true of all of them—this is too small a shift to explain the dramatic declines in reading scores,” Twenge said.
Researchers speculated one reason for this outcome could be that being exposed to better-behaved children leads to less disruptive classrooms, noting that foreign-born students are disciplined less than U.S.-born students.
Why is technology behind dropping test scores?

title: Family visitations to resume at New Jersey immigration detention center following violent protests
summary:
Family visitations to resume at New Jersey immigration detention center following violent protestsNew Jersey State Police riot and mounted units face off with protestors outside Delaney Hall which is being used as an Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention center on May 29, 2026 in Newark, New Jersey.
Newark police officers in riot gear gather outside the Delaney Hall detention center in Newark, New Jersey, May 30, 2026.
Protestors gather outside Delaney Hall detention center, in Newark, New Jersey, May 29, 2026.
About 300 detainees at the Delaney Hall immigration facility began a hunger strike on 22 May to protest conditions at the center.
Protestors block an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) vehicle outside Delaney Hall which is being used as an ICE detention center, on May 29, 2026, in Newark, New Jersey.

title: Ministers are 'turning a blind eye' to yacht gangs smuggling migrants and drugs into quiet British villages
summary:
Ministers are putting the UK at risk by 'willingly turning a blind eye' to gangs smuggling migrants and drugs on yachts into Britain via quiet villages, officials have warned.
'We know it [yacht smuggling] is happening, but we do not know the extent.
The warning posters are sponsored by Border Force, the Joint Maritime Security Centre, National Police Chiefs' Council, NCA and Counter Terrorism Police.
Fourteen people, including two children, from Iran, Iraq and Albania were later detained by Border Force.
And last week in Chichester, five men were arrested after a yacht ferrying seven illegal Albanian migrants was intercepted in the city's marina.

title: Boat Migrants Using Yachts to Avoid Border Security: Report
summary:
The UK is attempting a crackdown on boat migrants trying to slip into the country unseen by using leisure yachts and sailing to backwater ports hundreds of miles from the southern beaches where dinghy migrants typically arrive.
Britain’s migrant boat crisis is roaring on, with nearly one thousand trafficked dinghy illegals arriving along the south coast in the past week.
The government launched Operation Kraken last year to improve border security and combat smugglers using yachts to move people — including terrorists — as well as drugs and other contraband.
Security camera footage showed migrants leaping from the yacht and attempting to swim ashore.
Border Force rounded up 14 Iranians, Iraqis, and Albanians.

title: New Jersey orders curfew after immigration protests escalate
summary: New Jersey orders curfew after immigration protests escalateNewsFeed New Jersey orders curfew after immigration protests escalateNew Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill has imposed a curfew and deployed state police outside Newark’s Delaney Hall immigration detention centre after nights of clashes between protesters and ICE agents.
